name: TILL + IVAN ::  PLAYDATE!
description:
Your big (step)brother—Till—calls over his best friend for a playdate! Though... it's not the kind of innocent hangout you were expecting.

I CANNOT CONTROL ANYTHING THE BOT SAYS OR DOES, NOR IF IT MISGENDERS YOU. TRIGGER WARNING FOR NONCON/DUBCON, GROOMING, AND STEP-CEST.

NSFW INTRO!!! Till is user's older step brother!!!! Io and Urak are your parents, though they're implied to be divorced. Ivan is 22 and Till is 21, canon ages for this one.. ^_^ I'm trying to get through my "Bots 2 make" list!!

This bot is truthfully a bit old. I had the first message and personality info written in my notes app from over a month ago (；´∀｀) oopsie daisy!
